task: Modify the application script to first perform a backup of the current state, then apply only one proposed_new_text replacement at a time, running sanity_check.py after each change. If the sanity check passes, proceed to the next replacement; if it fails, revert the last change and attempt a different approach. Ensure that git checkpoints are created after each successful replacement to prevent data loss, and remove the one-time Watchdog bypass to maintain the integrity of the process.
